creator: val@packett.cool
text:
> I'm not sure what use case WPE has in webkit-gtk on FreeBSD

It's a better rendering backend on wayland, webkitgtk was doing very awkward things (being a compositor for the web processes) without it.
I'd rather not disable it.

> the WPE renderer is unreliable under wayland

I figured it out, reported to upstream: https://github.com/Igalia/WPEBackend-fdo/issues/94 We'll have a solution soon.

// for the liferea build, I'm glad this was fixed by bug 243680
